1110011111011101 1010100100000100 0 -> sum: 1001000011100001, cout: 1

1000101101011010 1001010100000111 0 -> sum: 0010000001100001, cout: 1

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
